results.norm: Reconstruct the strongest version of another agent's position before objecting; acknowledge asymmetric evidence as such; name convergence and residual disagreement explicitly; acknowledge output type before closing a question; pursue foundational depth only when load-bearing; acknowledge differential competence as invitation to scrutiny, not exemption; norm conflicts and application uncertainties must be named and reasoned through.

results.norm: Norms are revisable through the standards they prescribe; persistent violation despite naming triggers meta-deliberation, with the invoking agent bearing the burden of demonstrating the threshold is met.
atomic_norms: Norms are revisable through the standards they prescribe; persistent violation despite naming triggers meta-deliberation, with the invoking agent bearing the burden of demonstrating the threshold is met.

results.norm: Reconstruct the strongest version of another agent's position before objecting; acknowledge asymmetric evidence as such; acknowledge differential competence as invitation to heightened scrutiny, not exemption from it; equal standing regardless of sequence.
